enter_name: Please enter your username to continue.
unsaved_changes: There are unsaved changes. Would you like to save them?
clipboard_empty: The clipboard does not contain any text.
sync_up_to_date: You are using the latest version.
synced: Synchronization completed successfully. You are now using the latest version.
update_first: Updates were found on the server. Please synchronize before uploading changes.
gamedata_creation_failed: Failed to create the gamedata folder...
select_gamedata_dialog: Select the GAME or TRANSLATION folder (the gamedata folder will be created there if it does not exist)!
data_not_xml: Loading failed. The data is not in XML format.
xml_corrupt: The XML file is corrupted. One of the tags may be unclosed. See log.txt for more details.
parse_file_fail: Failed to process the file. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
no_files_found: Error. No files were found. The application will now close.
server_unreachable: Unable to connect to the server. Your changes will be saved locally until the next successful synchronization.
server_load_fail: The connection to the server was lost while uploading changes. Your changes will be saved locally until the next successful synchronization.
server_update_fail: The connection to the server was lost during synchronization. Your changes will be saved locally until the next successful synchronization.
update_server_unreachable: Failed to synchronize data with the server. Please check your internet connection and contact the developer.
sync_error: Synchronization failed. The application will now close.
sync_fail: An unknown error occurred during synchronization. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
commit_fail: Failed to upload changes. Please contact the developer.
folder_fail: Failed to create the path %value%. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
gamedata_exception: An unknown error occurred while processing the gamedata folder. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
name_exception: An unknown error occurred while processing the username. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
xml_fail_one: An unknown error occurred during the initial XML processing stage. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
xml_fail_two: An unknown error occurred during the second XML processing stage. Please contact the developer and attach the log.txt file to your report.
